zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost於大約1256年出生在丹麥奧盧姆迪斯泰德時，他的父親Ebbe Strangesen Bild-27歲，母親Bege Buggesdatter-27歲。他和Hustru至少有2個兒子。他去世於1314年之後在丹麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost于大约1256年出生在丹麦奧盧姆迪斯泰德时，他的父亲Ebbe Strangesen Bild-27岁，母亲Bege Buggesdatter-27岁。他和Hustru至少有2个儿子。他去世于1314年之后在丹麦。

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: Anders
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost was born about 1256, in Thisted, Ørum, Denmark, his father, Ebbe Strangesen Bild, was -27 and his mother, Bege Buggesdatter, was -27. He had at least 2 sons with Hustru. He died after 1314, in Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost est né environ 1256, à Thisted, Ørum, Danemark, son père, Ebbe Strangesen Bild, avait -27 ans et sa mère, Bege Buggesdatter, avait -27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Hustru. Il est décédé après 1314, à Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost um 1256 in Thisted, Ørum, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ebbe Strangesen Bild -27 und seine Mutter Bege Buggesdatter -27. Er hatte mit Hustru mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 1314 in Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost è nato il circa 1256 nel Thisted, Ørum, Danimarca, il suo padre, Ebbe Strangesen Bild, aveva -27 anni e il suo madre, Bege Buggesdatter, aveva -27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Hustru. Morì dopo il 1314, nel Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Anders Ebbesen Frostが約1256年にデンマークoルムスイステドで生まれた時，父Ebbe Strangesen Bildは-27歳，母Bege Buggesdatterは-27歳であった。彼はHustruとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1314年以後にデンマークで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost(이)가 대략 1256년 덴마크 o럼 스이스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebbe Strangesen Bild(은)는 -27세였고, 그의 어머니 Bege Buggesdatter(은)는 -27세였다. 그는 Hustru(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년 이후 덴마크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost nasceu aproximadamente 1256, em Thisted, Ørum, Dinamarca, seu pai, Ebbe Strangesen Bild, tinha -27 anos e sua mãe, Bege Buggesdatter, tinha -27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Hustru. Ele faleceu após 1314, em Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Anders Ebbesen Frost родился около 1256 г. в местности тистед, oрум, Дания, его отцу по имени Ebbe Strangesen Bild было -27 год, а матери, которую звали Bege Buggesdatter, -27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Hustru. Он умер после 1314 г. в местности Дания.
